training_status: moderate resistance training 3-4x/week, 20-30 min per session, no cardio

benefits.description: Lost approximately 50 lbs (226 lbs to 175 lbs) over ~4.5 months with improved body composition (15% body fat), visible abdominal definition (4-pack)
Significantly reduced appetite, making caloric deficit easier to maintain

protocol_notes: Started September 23, 2023 at 0.25 mg/week, increased to 0.5 mg/week after 2 weeks (accelerated titration vs standard 4-week schedule). Maintained 0.5 mg/week as maintenance dose. Combined with resistance training 3-4x/week and dietary modifications. User noted previous testosterone replacement therapy at men's clinic. Did not use additional energy supplements during semaglutide cycle. Mentioned taking B12+CoQ10+D3 previously during TRT. End date approximately January 27, 2024.
